match.userMessage:
Cinematic film still. Scene 10 — 6s
Looking back over her shoulder, she smiles, the same coral shade still bright on her mouth, before the next wave slides in and the frame holds on her moving figure in the water.. Art style: Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save. Mood: Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool. Lighting: Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Warm late-afternoon glow for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast. No text, no titles, no subtitles, no watermarks, no letters, no words, no signs, no UI elements.
